## Type of change

## Testing

<!-- Only the section(s) matching your change type need to be checked. -->
<!-- 只需勾选与你改动类型相符的检查项。 -->

### Docs-only changes

- [ ] I checked spelling and links.
- [ ] I confirmed the template / documentation renders correctly.

### Frontend changes

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`

### Rust / Tauri changes

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`

### Release changes

- [ ] Version numbers are aligned.
- [ ] Release notes are updated.
- [ ] Installer filename is correct.
- [ ] Release workflow is tested or documented.

## Screenshots

<!-- Required for UI changes. Drag screenshots here. -->
<!-- UI 改动必填。 -->

## Product principles

- [ ] Keeps Ome Music small, quiet, and music-first.
- [ ] Does not clutter the listening experience.
- [ ] Does not introduce large dependencies without discussion.

## Safety

- [ ] No build output, binaries, logs, caches, databases, or personal config committed.
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, cookies, passwords, or private data committed.
- [ ] No destructive operations without explicit maintainer approval.
